positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical vintage celestial body study, featuring a stylized mountain range merging with a stylized nebula sky. The foreground contains a crisp, clean silhouette of a crescent moon resting on stylized celestial flora (luminous glowing vines and crystalline mushrooms). The overall color palette is deep indigo, dusty lavender, sapphire blue, accented by brilliant gold and emerald green. Style must be highly graphic, reminiscent of vintage botanical engravings and Art Nouveau posters, combining clean line art with watercolor wash gradients. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing. Use strong contrasts between deep shadows and luminous highlights. High contrast, tattoo flash style, engraved illustration.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, blurry, blurry edges, grainy, artifacts, disfigured, low detail, modern, photographic, cartoon, sketch
